title: ATS Flow Graph V4
description: Schema for flow_graph.json — the DAG-based knowledge graph used by ATS Protocol to map business logic flows to code.

project.description: Project name. Should match the Flutter package name.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update. AI updates this when modifying the graph.

flows.description: Map of flow names to their definitions. Flow names should be SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE.

edges.description: Method-level call chain edges. Accumulated over time as AI discovers call paths during debugging.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this flow represents.

active.description: Whether ATS.trace() logs are enabled for this flow.

depends_on.description: Flow-level DAG: list of flow names this flow depends on. Must not form cycles.

parent.description: Parent flow name for sub-flow hierarchy. A flow can have at most one parent.

classes.description: Maps class names to method info. Supports both V3 array format and V4 object format.

oneOf.description: V3 format: list of method names.

known_issues.description: AI-maintained list of known bugs or gotchas in this flow.

last_debugged.description: ISO 8601 date of the last debug session for this flow.

sessions.description: AI debug session history. Institutional memory across sessions.

methods.description: List of method names that belong to this flow.

needs_verify.description: If true, AI should verify source code matches graph before trusting it.

last_verified.description: ISO 8601 date when AI last confirmed this class matches source code.

condition.description: Optional condition when this edge is taken.

action.description: What kind of work was done.

note.description: Brief description of what was done and why.

resolved.description: Whether the issue was resolved in this session.
